Script Text: <break time="1.0s" />Welcome everyone to a great night of Bingo, presented by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> We are putting the music on hold and bringing you the classic game you know and love!<break time="0.5s" /> If you need a bingo card, please signal your live host right now!<break time="0.5s" /> And be sure to ask them what the winning pattern is for this round!<break time="0.5s" /> Get those daubers ready, here we go!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />We have called five numbers so far!<break time="0.5s" /> We are just getting warmed up!<break time="0.5s" /> There is still plenty of time to join in, so wave down your host for a card!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />That makes fifteen numbers down!<break time="0.5s" /> The board is starting to fill up nicely!<break time="0.5s" /> Keep those eyes peeled!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Twenty-five numbers in the books!<break time="0.5s" /> Check your boards closely!<break time="0.5s" /> Someone out there has to be getting close to a win!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Thirty-five numbers called!<break time="0.5s" /> We are cruising right along!<break time="0.5s" /> Who is waiting on just one more?!<break time="5.0s" />
<break time="1.0s" />Fifty-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The tension is rising in the room!<break time="0.5s" /> Double check your markers, folks!<break time="5.0s" />

<break time="1.0s" />Well, that is all seventy-five numbers!<break time="0.5s" /> The hopper is officially empty!<break time="0.5s" /> Thank you all for playing this round with us, powered by AMI Entertainment!<break time="0.5s" /> Stay tuned, to hear about any more upcomming games of AMI MUSIC BINGO!<break time="5.0s" />
